high_fidelity_structure.layout: A dense white mobile marketplace with an orange search and commerce accent, two rows of circular quick actions, three shallow hero tiles, then a two-column editorial recommendation grid above a fixed five-item navigation rail.

replaced_source_assets.brand: Mori Market and a hand-drawn orange M mark replace the source brand and logo.
replaced_source_assets.products: All product imagery is self-authored inline SVG artwork: a sandwich, game controller, service robot, desk dock, music mirror, lamp and keyboard.
replaced_source_assets.copy: All labels, offer language, item names, prices and social counts are fictional and independently authored.
